source_metadata.title: 2025/12/01 - TI (Part 3)
source_metadata.description:
Monday 1 December 2025 | Transport and Infrastructure Committee

New Zealand Infrastructure Commission, Te Waihanga

Raveen Jaduram, Chair
Geoff Cooper, Chief Executive

James Mugambi, Private Secretary
